title: Junzi Wu Ji

alternative_titles.en: Everything is Fine with the Emperor

synopsis:
Liu Ling, the third prince who grew up in the cold palace, has a secret: he can see "gods"! Watch as the down-on-his-luck young man encounters the celestial beauty Yao Ji, who descends from the heavens. With the help of a group of former imperial concubines possessing extraordinary skills, how will Liu Ling embark on a passionate and romantic journey of growth and transformation? The two, from different worlds, gradually develop feelings for each other, but are unexpectedly drawn into a complex court intrigue. The secrets of the gods and the mysteries of the imperial concubines are gradually revealed…

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
